description_long: This is a metallic combination wrench featuring an open-ended jaw on one side and a closed, ring-shaped box end on the other. The open end is angled slightly, allowing for easier access to nuts and bolts in tight spaces, while the box end has an internal geometry designed to grip hexagonal fasteners securely. The shaft is straight, slender, and uniform in width, with a smooth, polished surface that reflects light subtly. There are no visible brand markings, grip patterns, or additional features on the handle, giving it a utilitarian and minimalist appearance. The entire object is a single piece of metal, likely steel, and appears robust and durable, suitable for mechanical or automotive tasks in urban environments. The finish is clean and free of rust or wear, indicating it is either new or well-maintained.
description: A polished metal combination wrench with an open end and a closed ring end, featuring a smooth, minimalist handle. The tool is robust, metallic, and free of visible markings or wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open jaw on the left and the closed ring end on the right, with the full length and slender handle visible.
description_view_1: Edge-on view showing the thin profile of the wrench, with the open and closed ends appearing as narrow lines.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the open jaw now on the right and the closed ring end on the left.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side of view 1, again highlighting the thinness and uniform width of the handle.
